product.name: Tubi Copilot
product.tagline: Your AI-powered coding assistant, right inside IntelliJ IDEA
product.description: Tubi Copilot is an intelligent plugin for IntelliJ IDEA that brings a powerful AI chat assistant directly into your development workflow. Ask questions, generate code, plan features, and execute changes — all without leaving your IDE.

features.title: Smart Chat Assistant
features.description: Interact with a context-aware AI assistant that understands your codebase and helps you write, review, and refactor code efficiently.

features.title: Context Attachments
features.description: Attach files, folders, or code snippets directly into your conversation using the @mention syntax for precise, relevant answers.

features.title: Agent Modes
features.description: Switch between Ask, Plan, and Execute modes to adapt the assistant to your current task — from quick Q&A to full automated file changes.

features.title: Code-Aware Proposals
features.description: In Agent mode, proposed code changes are displayed in a dedicated panel where you can review, keep, or skip each change before applying.

features.title: Conversation History
features.description: All your conversations are saved and accessible from the history panel, so you can revisit and continue any previous session.

features.title: Secure by Design
features.description: Authentication uses OAuth2 with PKCE. Your credentials are stored securely in the OS keychain — never in plain text files.

releases.highlights: Bug fix — Sửa lỗi NPE khi render Markdown HTML (CSS3 không tương thích Swing); thêm thông báo kiểm tra phiên bản mới khi khởi động plugin.
Major upgrade — Tái kiến trúc Strategy Pattern; Agent Loop 13 tools; SQLite history per-project; @mention bundle; đính kèm hình ảnh; giao diện GitHub Copilot-style.
Initial release — Ask, Plan, Execute modes; OAuth2 login; conversation history.
